channel.title: Pattern on Design Moodboard Archive
channel.description: Recent content in Pattern on Design Moodboard Archive

item.title: Indian Textile Artist Reference
item.description: Replace this with a specific artist and their favorite pieces.

item.title: Pattern Maker Placeholder
item.description: Useful for artists whose work inspires fabrics or color combinations.

item.title: People / Artist / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian artists and makers whose work can influence rooms, color, textiles, or objects.

item.title: Rug and Cushion Reference
item.description: Useful for patterns, borders, woven textures, and room palettes.

item.title: Stores / Clothes
item.description: Use this collection for clothes, labels, textile-led fashion, prints, and garment details.

item.title: Stores / Objects / Textile / Indian
item.description: Use this collection for Indian textile sources, rugs, cushions, wall textiles, fabric artwork, and pattern-based pieces.

item.title: Textile Clothing Reference
item.description: Add favorite garments, size notes, and source links here.
